summary: Added a Chapter Crew Relay inside the selected Path Map Chapter Archive record deck so each chapter shows the responsible lane bots, thread context, proof/gate/trace pressure, and local COM/Q handoff controls.

queries: team handoff dashboard UX command center ownership dashboard patterns
incident command dashboard handoff owner status communication UX
collaboration activity feed assigned owner compact card UX dashboard
pattern_notes: Command-center surfaces need an at-a-glance shared operating picture with enough status to act quickly.
Incident-style handoffs work best when the owner, current state, next action, and communication channel are visible together.
Dashboard drilldowns should start from summary context and reveal the detailed record stack only when the operator asks for it.

ui_contract: Render Chapter Crew Relay inside the selected Chapter Archive record deck.
Derive crew cards from laneAgents(lane), falling back to lane owner metadata for new repos without bound agent records.
Show chapter pressure for proof, gates, traces, and dispatch urgency.
Expose COM and Q actions while keeping Q as a browser-local staged draft only.
Keep the relay responsive with no clipped labels or horizontal overflow.

red_green.red: pytest tests\test_agent_company_atlas_path_chapter_crew_relay.py -q failed before frontend wiring on missing function pathChapterCrewRecords.

browser_green_route.evidence: Rendered Chapter Crew Relay for the 06/15 chapter with Foundry Lead, thread id, gate-watch role, 43 proof pressure, 3 gates, 0 traces, 94 urgency, and OK/COM/TRL actions.

local_queue_action.evidence: The relay-scoped Q/OK button resolved to exactly one element, clicked successfully, kept the relay in staged state, updated the browser-local Dispatch Console outbox count, and produced no console errors.

responsive.evidence: All tested viewports rendered one relay, one crew card, OK/COM/TRL actions, no horizontal overflow, no bad rectangles, and no clipped crew text. The narrow wide-desktop Path Map column collapsed to one clean relay column after the auto-fit grid fix.
